evals.prompt: dhelix E2E 테스트를 실행해줘. Stack 2 (Spring Boot + React)로 Task Board 프로젝트를 멀티턴으로 만들어줘. /init으로 시작하고, DHELIX.md 규칙을 따르는지 확인해줘. 빌드와 테스트 커버리지 80% 이상 달성해야 해.
evals.expected_output: 9-turn multi-turn session creating a Spring Boot + React Task Board app with passing build, 80%+ test coverage, and verified DHELIX.md compliance

assertions.name: dhelix_md_created
assertions.description: DHELIX.md file is created in project root after /init turn

assertions.name: build_success_backend
assertions.description: Backend build (./gradlew build) succeeds with exit code 0

assertions.name: build_success_frontend
assertions.description: Frontend build (npm run build) succeeds with exit code 0

assertions.name: test_coverage_80
assertions.description: Test coverage is >= 80% for both backend and frontend

assertions.name: dhelix_read_count
assertions.description: DHELIX.md is read by the agent at least 2 times during the session

assertions.name: all_turns_complete
assertions.description: All 9 turns complete without error

evals.prompt: Stack 1 (Spring MVC + JSP + JavaScript)로 Todo Manager를 만드는 E2E 테스트를 실행해줘. DHELIX.md에 JSP에서 scriptlet 사용 금지를 명시하고, 실제로 지켜지는지 확인해줘. 테스트 커버리지 80% 필수.
evals.expected_output: 9-turn session creating Spring MVC + JSP Todo Manager. No scriptlets in JSP files. JaCoCo coverage >= 80%. DHELIX.md conventions verified.

assertions.name: no_scriptlets_in_jsp
assertions.description: No <% %> scriptlet tags found in any .jsp file

assertions.name: dhelix_md_created
assertions.description: DHELIX.md exists with scriptlet prohibition rule

assertions.name: maven_build_success
assertions.description: mvn clean package succeeds

assertions.name: jacoco_coverage_80
assertions.description: JaCoCo reports >= 80% line coverage

evals.prompt: Flutter WebView + Spring Boot (Stack 5)로 Smart Notes 앱을 멀티턴으로 만들어줘. /init 필수, DHELIX.md에 JavaScript bridge 규칙 명시. 백엔드는 Thymeleaf + REST API 둘 다. 빌드 성공 + 80% 커버리지.
evals.expected_output: 10-turn session creating Flutter WebView + Spring Boot Smart Notes app. Both Thymeleaf pages and REST API. JavaScript bridge working. Build passes, coverage >= 80%.

assertions.name: thymeleaf_templates_exist
assertions.description: Thymeleaf .html templates exist in src/main/resources/templates/

assertions.name: rest_api_exists
assertions.description: REST controller exists under api/ package

assertions.name: flutter_webview_configured
assertions.description: Flutter app has webview_flutter dependency and WebView widget

assertions.name: js_bridge_implemented
assertions.description: JavaScript bridge (FlutterBridge or equivalent) is implemented

assertions.name: backend_build_success
assertions.description: ./gradlew build succeeds

assertions.name: coverage_80
assertions.description: Backend coverage >= 80%

evals.prompt: 대화 품질 테스트를 실행해줘. 시나리오 1 (Context Retention) — 에이전트가 이전 턴의 정보를 정확히 기억하는지 검증해줘. config.json 만들고 수정한 뒤, 원래 값을 기억하는지 확인.
evals.expected_output: 5-turn session testing context retention. Agent correctly recalls original values after modifications. Cross-file consistency maintained.

assertions.name: original_value_recalled
assertions.description: Agent's Turn 4 response mentions original maxRetries value (3)

assertions.name: new_field_recalled
assertions.description: Agent's Turn 4 response mentions 'logLevel' as the new field

assertions.name: config_max_retries_updated
assertions.description: config.json has maxRetries: 5 after Turn 3

assertions.name: config_log_level_added
assertions.description: config.json has logLevel: debug after Turn 3

assertions.name: readme_consistent
assertions.description: README.md values match config.json after Turn 5

assertions.name: no_hallucination_999
assertions.description: Agent does not invent values not mentioned in any turn

evals.prompt: 대화 품질 테스트를 실행해줘. 시나리오 2 (Tool Call Coherence) — 에이전트가 도구를 논리적 순서로 사용하는지 검증. 파일 수정 전 반드시 읽기, file_edit 우선 사용 등.
evals.expected_output: 5-turn session testing tool call patterns. Agent reads files before editing, uses file_edit over file_write for modifications, no redundant tool calls.

assertions.name: read_before_edit
assertions.description: Every file_edit is preceded by a file_read of the same file

assertions.name: edit_over_write
assertions.description: Agent uses file_edit (not file_write) for modifying existing files

assertions.name: no_redundant_reads
assertions.description: No duplicate consecutive reads of the same file without reason

assertions.name: all_turns_complete
assertions.description: All 5 turns complete without error

evals.prompt: 대화 품질 테스트를 실행해줘. 시나리오 3 (Error Recovery) — 에이전트가 실패 상황에서 자체 복구하는 능력을 검증. 테스트 실패 시 원인 파악하고 수정하는지 확인.
evals.expected_output: 5-turn session testing error recovery. Agent diagnoses failures, applies fixes, retries successfully. No infinite retry loops.

assertions.name: error_diagnosed
assertions.description: Agent identifies root cause when a command fails

assertions.name: fix_applied
assertions.description: Agent uses tools to fix the issue (not just retry)

assertions.name: final_tests_pass
assertions.description: Final test run has 0 failures

assertions.name: bounded_iterations
assertions.description: No turn exceeds 15 iterations

evals.prompt: 대화 품질 테스트를 실행해줘. 시나리오 4 (Instruction Adherence) — 에이전트가 세션 전반에 걸쳐 코딩 규칙(camelCase, JSDoc, const, no console.log)을 일관되게 따르는지 검증.
evals.expected_output: 5-turn session testing instruction adherence. All generated .ts files follow 4 rules consistently across turns. Self-review in Turn 5 is accurate.

assertions.name: jsdoc_present
assertions.description: All functions in .ts files have JSDoc comments

assertions.name: no_console_log
assertions.description: No console.log in any .ts file

assertions.name: const_preferred
assertions.description: No 'let' where 'const' could be used

assertions.name: self_review_accurate
assertions.description: Turn 5 self-review correctly identifies any violations

evals.prompt: 대화 품질 테스트를 실행해줘. 시나리오 5 (Progressive Complexity) — 단순 계산기에서 연산자 우선순위/괄호까지 점진적으로 복잡해지는 요구사항을 처리하는지 검증.
evals.expected_output: 5-turn session testing progressive complexity. Calculator evolves from basic ops to operator precedence with parentheses. All features backward compatible. Tests cover all turns.

assertions.name: backward_compatible
assertions.description: Original 2-argument calculate() still works after Turn 3-4

assertions.name: all_features_present
assertions.description: Final code supports basic ops, modulo, power, chaining, precedence, parentheses

assertions.name: tests_pass
assertions.description: All tests pass in Turn 5

assertions.name: cumulative_test_coverage
assertions.description: Tests cover scenarios from ALL turns, not just latest

evals.prompt: 대화 품질 테스트를 실행해줘. 시나리오 6 (Contradiction Handling) — 사용자가 이전 턴과 모순되는 지시를 줄 때 에이전트의 대응을 검증. API prefix와 인증 방식 변경 후 복원.
evals.expected_output: 5-turn session testing contradiction handling. Agent applies latest-wins, cleans up stale code, acknowledges contradictions transparently.

assertions.name: latest_wins
assertions.description: After Turn 5, JWT auth is used (latest instruction)

assertions.name: prefix_correct
assertions.description: After Turn 5, /v2/ prefix is used (not /api/v1/)

assertions.name: no_stale_code
assertions.description: No leftover session-based auth code after Turn 5

assertions.name: doc_code_sync
assertions.description: api-design.md matches server.ts after final turn
